title: Fix primary navigation dropdown overlap issue

requirements.summary: Fix dropdown overlap in primary navigation by implementing proper stacking context with absolute positioning and z-index
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the first dropdown in the primary navigation does not shift, overlap, or obscure any other navigation headings or dropdowns.
The dropdown panel floats above page content via absolute positioning and a high z-index.
All items in the open dropdown list are fully readable without clipping or overflow into sibling nav elements.
Closing the dropdown restores the navigation bar to its original layout with no residual overlap.

file_operations.description: Update the navigation structure to ensure dropdown menus use absolute positioning with a high z-index (e.g., z-50 or higher) and proper overflow handling. Ensure the parent nav container has position: relative and overflow: visible to allow dropdowns to float above sibling elements. Add proper stacking context to prevent dropdown list items from overlapping adjacent dropdown triggers or headings.

Add or update CSS custom properties and utility classes for navigation dropdown z-index layers if needed. Ensure global styles support proper stacking contexts for navigation overlays and do not inadvertently clip dropdown content.
